description: Canonical literature-based QA tests for LLM qualification. TCF-agnostic. Each question has deterministic verification. v2 (2026-04-20): fixed PT ambiguities discovered in V1 — 'cores' (colors vs CPU cores), 'palavras entre aspas' (scope unclear). Note: LLMs are English-biased; PT prompts may produce more complex tokenization and lower accuracy than EN equivalents. Changes should be re-applied to previously-tested models.

questions.prompt_pt: Qual a capital do Brasil? Responda apenas com o nome da cidade.
questions.prompt_en: What is the capital of Brazil? Answer with just the city name.
questions.notes: Basic geographical fact in Portuguese and English. Most models >1B should know this.

questions.prompt_pt: Qual a capital da França? Responda apenas com o nome da cidade.
questions.prompt_en: What is the capital of France? Answer with just the city name.
questions.notes: Even more universal fact. Canary for basic knowledge.

questions.prompt_pt: Quanto é 17 + 28? Responda apenas com o número.
questions.prompt_en: What is 17 + 28? Answer with just the number.
questions.notes: Simple two-digit addition. Tests numerical reasoning.

questions.prompt_pt: Quanto é 12 vezes 8? Responda apenas com o número.
questions.prompt_en: What is 12 times 8? Answer with just the number.

questions.prompt_pt: Responda apenas com a palavra 'sim', sem nada mais.
questions.prompt_en: Reply only with the word 'yes', nothing else.
questions.notes: Tests whether model respects format constraints. Verbose models may fail.

questions.prompt_pt: Conte apenas as palavras dentro das aspas, ignorando o resto do enunciado. Texto: "A raposa marrom pula". Responda somente com o número de palavras do texto citado.
questions.prompt_en: Count only the words inside the quotes, ignoring the rest of the question. Text: "The quick brown fox". Answer with just the number of words in the quoted text.
questions.notes: V2: explicit scope. V2.1: accept 3 as linguistic variant (PT articles excluded — 'A' not counted). Record answered value for downstream analysis — affects q_count interpretation in TCF.

questions.prompt_pt: Liste 3 nomes de cores (como vermelho, azul, amarelo), separados por vírgula. Responda apenas com os 3 nomes de cores.
questions.prompt_en: List 3 color names (like red, blue, yellow), separated by commas. Answer with just the 3 color names.
questions.notes: V2: examples given to disambiguate. V1 ambiguity: PT 'cores' collided with computer 'cores' (CPU) — models answered 'Intel i3, i5, i7' etc.
